THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANSEN JOHN HANSEN BRENDA RAYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIDSON RODNEY DAVIDSON AUSTRY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DAVIDSON RODNEY DAVIDSON AUSTRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HANSEN JOHN HANSEN BRENDA RAYA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
